creator: waneyvin@ms28.hinet.net
text:
I'd got a trouble while installing FreeBSD3.2 on my server
it's an Intel-L440GX-motherboard-machine
where is an Adapter AIC-7896 SCSI chip on board
and of course my only SCSI harddisk is connected on it
but I just can't find the disk while installing 
how should I do ?
it's emergency for me!
would somebody please help me!please mail me the solution<waneyvin@ms28.hinet.net>

How-To-Repeat: please mail me the solution<waneyvin@ms28.hinet.net>
